question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de documents traités pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_documents FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été extraits avec succès (état SUCCESS) ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS documents_reussis FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS';

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des types de budget (BP vs BA) parmi les documents ?
sql: SELECT budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nombre FROM documents GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Liste des communes distinctes ayant soumis des documents en 2023.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Nombre moyen de pages des documents au format PDF.
sql: SELECT AVG(nb_pages) AS pages_moyennes FROM documents WHERE format = 'pdf';

question_fr: Combien de documents présentent un message d'avertissement ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS docs_avec_alertes FROM documents WHERE warning_message IS NOT NULL AND warning_message != '';

question_fr: Quels sont les types de masque documentaire existants et leur fréquence ?
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS occurrence FROM documents GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Nombre de documents par année budgétaire.
sql: SELECT document_year, COUNT(*) AS total FROM documents GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur extraite moyenne du champ 'D001' (dette) pour la commune de Paris en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS dette_moyenne FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.city_name LIKE '%Paris%' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Liste des communes avec plus de 5 documents traités, classées par volume décroissant.
sql: SELECT city_name, COUNT(*) AS total_documents FROM documents GROUP BY city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY total_documents DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque type de document (mask), quel est le taux d'échec d'extraction (documents en état ERROR) ?
sql: SELECT d.mask, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS taux_echec FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Top 5 des indicateurs financiers les plus fréquemment extraits (safir_field_id) en 2024.
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS occurrences FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont des documents avec des valeurs manquantes pour le champ 'DF011' (dépenses d'investissement) ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.city_name FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND (er.value IS NULL OR er.value = '');

question_fr: Comparaison du nombre de documents entre 2023 et 2024 par type de budget.
sql: SELECT budget_type, SUM(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS annee_2023, SUM(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS annee_2024 FROM documents GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Durée moyenne d'exécution des extractions (différence entre start_time et created_at des résultats) pour les documents M57_CA.
sql: SELECT AVG(JULIANDAY(er.created_at) - JULIANDAY(r.start_time)) * 86400 AS duree_moyenne_sec FROM extraction_runs r JOIN extraction_results er ON r.run_id = er.run_id JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.mask = 'M57_CA';

question_fr: Quels indicateurs financiers présentent plus de 10% de valeurs nulles ou vides ?
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN value IS NULL OR value = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS taux_vides FROM extraction_results GROUP BY safir_field_id HAVING taux_vides > 10;

question_fr: Identifier les communes où la dette (champ 'D001') a augmenté de plus de 10% entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'), dette_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d23.city_name, d23.valeur AS dette_2023, d24.valeur AS dette_2024, ROUND((d24.valeur - d23.valeur) * 100.0 / d23.valeur, 2) AS evolution_pct FROM dette_2023 d23 JOIN dette_2024 d24 ON d23.city_name = d24.city_name WHERE d24.valeur > d23.valeur * 1.10;

question_fr: Quelles règles d'extraction (safir_field_id) n'ont jamais produit d'erreur sur les documents validés ?
sql: SELECT fr.safir_field_id FROM field_rules fr WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = fr.safir_field_id AND s.code = 'VALIDATED' AND (er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error != ''));

question_fr: Quels ensembles de règles (ruleset_id) incluent à la fois des règles d'extraction et des règles de validation pour le masque M57_CA ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT fr.ruleset_id FROM field_rules fr JOIN validation_rules vr ON fr.ruleset_id = vr.ruleset_id WHERE fr.mask = 'M57_CA' AND vr.mask = 'M57_CA';

question_fr: Quel est le montant total de la dette (indicateur D001) pour toutes les communes en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS dette_totale_2024 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été traités avec succès pour le budget principal (BP) en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur moyenne des dépenses d'investissement (indicateur DF011) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS depenses_moyennes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND d.city_name IN ('Paris', 'Marseille', 'Lyon', 'Toulouse');

question_fr: Liste des communes ayant soumis des documents au format PDF en 2024.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM documents WHERE format = 'pdf' AND document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de pages traitées pour les documents M57_CA en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(nb_pages) AS total_pages FROM documents WHERE mask = 'M57_CA' AND document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Combien de documents présentent des avertissements lors de l'extraction pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE warning_message != '' AND document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur maximale de recettes de fonctionnement (indicateur RF01) extraite en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT MAX(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS recettes_max FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Pourcentage de documents avec budget annexe (BA) parmi les documents 2024.
sql: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE budget_type = 'BA') * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS pourcentage_ba FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Classement des 5 communes avec les plus hautes dettes (D001) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' ORDER BY dette DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Évolution du nombre de documents traités entre 2023 et 2024 par type de masque.
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE document_year = '2023') AS count_2023, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE document_year = '2024') AS count_2024 FROM documents GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont une dette (D001) supérieure à la moyenne nationale en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > (SELECT AVG(CAST(value AS REAL)) FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'D001' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024'));

question_fr: Répartition des indicateurs financiers les plus fréquemment extraits en 2024.
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS nombre_extractions FROM extraction_results WHERE document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY nombre_extractions DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Taux d'échec d'extraction par type de document (mask) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.mask, (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE s.code = 'ERROR') * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS taux_echec FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Montant total des investissements (DF011) par région (groupement de communes) en 2024.
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN d.city_name LIKE '%AGGLOMERATION%' THEN 'Agglomération' WHEN d.city_name LIKE '%METROPOLE%' THEN 'Métropole' ELSE 'Commune' END AS type_entite, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY type_entite;

question_fr: Quels indicateurs financiers n'ont jamais été extraits avec erreur en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT safir_field_id FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id NOT IN (SELECT safir_field_id FROM extraction_results WHERE message_error != '' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024')) AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024');

question_fr: Comparaison des dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) entre budgets principaux (BP) et annexes (BA) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS depenses_moyennes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur dette (D001) augmenter de plus de 10% entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'), dette_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d2024.siret, d2023.valeur AS dette_2023, d2024.valeur AS dette_2024 FROM dette_2024 d2024 JOIN dette_2023 d2023 ON d2024.siret = d2023.siret WHERE (d2024.valeur - d2023.valeur) / d2023.valeur > 0.1;

question_fr: Quels ensembles de règles (ruleset) incluent des validations pour la dette (D001) et les investissements (DF011) ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT vr.ruleset_id FROM validation_rules vr WHERE vr.safir_field_id_list LIKE '%D001%' AND vr.safir_field_id_list LIKE '%DF011%';

question_fr: Taux de complétude par indicateur financier (pourcentage de valeurs non vides) en 2024.
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE value != '') * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS taux_remplissage FROM extraction_results WHERE document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY taux_remplissage DESC;

question_fr: Détection des anomalies : communes où les dépenses (DF01) dépassent 150% des recettes (RF01) en 2024.
sql: SELECT dep.document_id, dep.value AS depenses, rec.value AS recettes FROM (SELECT er.document_id, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS value FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND er.document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024')) dep JOIN (SELECT er.document_id, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS value FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND er.document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024')) rec ON dep.document_id = rec.document_id WHERE dep.value > rec.value * 1.5;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) pour toutes les communes en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_depenses_fonctionnement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de communes ont déclaré des recettes d'investissement (RI01) supérieures à 500 000 € en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.siret) FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RI01' AND d.document_year = '2023' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > 500000;

question_fr: Quelle est la dette moyenne (D001) des communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS dette_moyenne FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Répartition des documents par type de budget (BP/BA) pour l'année 2024.
sql: SELECT budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen dépenses/investissements par commune en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT d.siret, AVG(CAST(er1.value AS REAL) / NULLIF(CAST(er2.value AS REAL), 0)) AS ratio FROM extraction_results er1 JOIN extraction_results er2 ON er1.document_id = er2.document_id JOIN documents d ON er1.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er1.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.siret;

question_fr: Top 5 des communes avec les plus hautes recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS recettes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' ORDER BY recettes DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Comparaison du total des investissements (DF011) entre budgets principaux et annexes en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissements FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un ratio dette/recettes supérieur à 1.5 en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM extraction_results er1 JOIN extraction_results er2 ON er1.document_id = er2.document_id JOIN documents d ON er1.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er1.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND (CAST(er1.value AS REAL) / CAST(er2.value AS REAL)) > 1.5;

question_fr: Évolution de la dette moyenne (D001) entre 2023 et 2024 par type de document.
sql: SELECT d.mask, d.document_year, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS dette_moyenne FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_year ORDER BY d.mask, d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents présente des anomalies de validation pour les indicateurs clés ?
sql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL THEN d.document_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id)) AS pourcentage_anomalies FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelles règles de validation sont les plus fréquemment déclenchées pour les documents M57_CA en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT vr.definition, COUNT(*) AS occurrences FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id JOIN validation_rules vr ON er.message_error LIKE '%' || vr.validation_rule_id || '%' WHERE d.mask = 'M57_CA' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY vr.definition ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Détecter les communes où les dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) dépassent de 20% la moyenne départementale en 2024.
sql: WITH moyenne_dep AS (SELECT AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_df01 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS depenses FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id, moyenne_dep WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > moyenne_dep.avg_df01 * 1.2;

question_fr: Analyse de la corrélation entre le nombre de pages des documents et le taux d'erreur d'extraction par commune en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, d.nb_pages, (COUNT(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS taux_erreur FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name, d.nb_pages ORDER BY taux_erreur DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) pour toutes les communes en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_recettes_fonctionnement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de communes ont déclaré des dépenses d'investissement (DF011) supérieures à 1 million d'euros en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.siret) AS nombre_communes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2023' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > 1000000;

question_fr: Quelle est la dette moyenne (D001) des communes ayant publié des documents M57_CA en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS dette_moyenne FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.mask = 'M57_CA' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Liste des communes dont le ratio dette/recettes (D001/RF01) dépasse 1.2 en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er_d.value AS REAL) / CAST(er_r.value AS REAL) AS ratio FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_d ON d.document_id = er_d.document_id AND er_d.safir_field_id = 'D001' JOIN extraction_results er_r ON d.document_id = er_r.document_id AND er_r.safir_field_id = 'RF01' WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND ratio > 1.2;

question_fr: Top 5 des communes avec les plus hautes recettes d'investissement (RI01) en 2023.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS recettes_investissement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RI01' AND d.document_year = '2023' ORDER BY recettes_investissement DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Évolution du montant total des investissements (DF011) entre 2023 et 2024 par type de budget.
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, d.document_year, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissements FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY d.budget_type, d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) augmenter de plus de 15% entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH depenses_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df01 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2023'), depenses_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df01 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name, ((d2024.df01 - d2023.df01) / d2023.df01) * 100 AS evolution_pourcentage FROM documents d JOIN depenses_2023 d2023 ON d.siret = d2023.siret JOIN depenses_2024 d2024 ON d.siret = d2024.siret WHERE ((d2024.df01 - d2023.df01) / d2023.df01) > 0.15;

question_fr: Répartition du nombre de documents par type de masque et par année.
sql: SELECT mask, document_year, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents GROUP BY mask, document_year ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen dépenses/investissements (DF01/DF011) par commune en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(er_df01.value AS REAL) / CAST(er_df011.value AS REAL)) AS ratio_moyen FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_df01 ON d.document_id = er_df01.document_id AND er_df01.safir_field_id = 'DF01' JOIN extraction_results er_df011 ON d.document_id = er_df011.document_id AND er_df011.safir_field_id = 'DF011' WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Détecter les communes où les recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) sont inférieures à 80% des dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er_rf.value AS REAL) AS recettes, CAST(er_df.value AS REAL) AS depenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_rf ON d.document_id = er_rf.document_id AND er_rf.safir_field_id = 'RF01' JOIN extraction_results er_df ON d.document_id = er_df.document_id AND er_df.safir_field_id = 'DF01' WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(er_rf.value AS REAL) < 0.8 * CAST(er_df.value AS REAL);

question_fr: Comparaison des dettes moyennes (D001) entre budgets principaux et annexes en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS dette_moyenne FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Top 10 des indicateurs financiers les plus fréquemment extraits avec succès en 2024.
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS nombre_extractions FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND s.code = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY er.safir_field_id ORDER BY nombre_extractions DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents présente des anomalies de validation pour la dette (D001) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL THEN d.document_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id)) AS pourcentage_anomalies FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Montant total des investissements (DF011) par région (groupement par deux premiers chiffres du SIRET) en 2024.
sql: SELECT SUBSTR(d.siret,1,2) AS region, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissements FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY region;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un ratio recettes/dettes (RF01/D001) inférieur à 0.8 en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er_rf.value AS REAL) / CAST(er_d.value AS REAL) AS ratio FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_rf ON d.document_id = er_rf.document_id AND er_rf.safir_field_id = 'RF01' JOIN extraction_results er_d ON d.document_id = er_d.document_id AND er_d.safir_field_id = 'D001' WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND ratio < 0.8;

question_fr: Nombre de documents traités avec succès par format (PDF, scan, image) en 2023.
sql: SELECT d.format, COUNT(*) AS documents_reussis FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND s.code = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY d.format;

question_fr: Classement des communes par niveau d'endettement (D001) décroissant en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' ORDER BY dette DESC;

question_fr: Détecter les communes où les dépenses totales dépassent 120% des recettes totales en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_dep ON d.document_id = er_dep.document_id AND er_dep.safir_field_id IN ('DF01','DF011') JOIN extraction_results er_rec ON d.document_id = er_rec.document_id AND er_rec.safir_field_id IN ('RF01','RI01') WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING SUM(CAST(er_dep.value AS REAL)) > 1.2 * SUM(CAST(er_rec.value AS REAL));

question_fr: Évolution du nombre moyen de pages des documents entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: SELECT document_year, AVG(nb_pages) AS pages_moyennes FROM documents WHERE document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Quels indicateurs financiers présentent le plus fort taux d'erreurs d'extraction en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, (COUNT(CASE WHEN s.code = 'ERROR' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS taux_erreur FROM extraction_results er JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY er.safir_field_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY taux_erreur DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) pour toutes les communes en 2023 ?

question_fr: Combien de communes ont déclaré des recettes d'investissement (RI01) supérieures à 500 000 € en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un ratio dette/recettes (D001/RF01) supérieur à 1.2 en 2024 ?

question_fr: Évolution du montant total des investissements (DF011) entre 2023 et 2024 par type de masque.

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) pour toutes les communes en 2023 ?

question_fr: Combien de communes ont déclaré des dépenses d'investissement (DF011) supérieures à 1 million d'euros en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents 2024 sont des budgets annexes (BA) ?
sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN budget_type = 'BA' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS pourcentage_ba FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024'

question_fr: Comparaison des dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) entre communes de plus de 100 000 habitants et les autres en 2024.
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(d.siret, 1, 9) AS INTEGER) > 100000 THEN 'Grandes communes' ELSE 'Autres communes' END AS categorie, AVG(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS depenses_moyennes FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND e.value <> '' GROUP BY categorie

question_fr: Évolution du montant total des investissements (DF011) entre 2023 et 2024 par type de masque documentaire.

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un ratio dette/recettes (D001/RF01) supérieur à 1.5 en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e1 ON d.document_id = e1.document_id JOIN extraction_results e2 ON d.document_id = e2.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND e1.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND e2.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND e1.value <> '' AND e2.value <> '' AND (CAST(e1.value AS REAL) / CAST(e2.value AS REAL)) > 1.5 GROUP BY d.city_name

question_fr: Comparaison des recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) entre documents PDF et scans en 2024.

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) augmenter de plus de 10% entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d2024.city_name FROM documents d2024 JOIN extraction_results e2024 ON d2024.document_id = e2024.document_id JOIN documents d2023 ON d2024.siret = d2023.siret JOIN extraction_results e2023 ON d2023.document_id = e2023.document_id WHERE d2024.document_year = '2024' AND d2023.document_year = '2023' AND e2024.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND e2023.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND e2024.value <> '' AND e2023.value <> '' AND (CAST(e2024.value AS REAL) - CAST(e2023.value AS REAL)) / CAST(e2023.value AS REAL) > 0.1

question_fr: Taux de documents avec anomalies de validation pour la dette (D001) en 2024.
sql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.message_error IS NOT NULL AND e.message_error <> '' THEN d.document_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id)) AS taux_anomalies FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id AND e.safir_field_id = 'D001' WHERE d.document_year = '2024'

question_fr: Top 3 des règles de validation les plus fréquemment déclenchées pour les documents M57_CFU en 2024.
sql: SELECT v.definition, COUNT(*) AS nombre_declenchements FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id JOIN validation_rules v ON e.message_error LIKE '%' || v.validation_rule_id || '%' WHERE d.mask = 'M57_CFU' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND e.message_error IS NOT NULL GROUP BY v.definition ORDER BY nombre_declenchements DESC LIMIT 3

question_fr: Communes où les dépenses totales dépassent 120% des recettes totales en 2024 (somme RF01 + RI01 vs DF01 + DF011).
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM documents d JOIN (SELECT document_id, SUM(CASE safir_field_id WHEN 'RF01' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) WHEN 'RI01' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_totales, SUM(CASE safir_field_id WHEN 'DF01' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) WHEN 'DF011' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS depenses_totales FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id IN ('RF01','RI01','DF01','DF011') AND value <> '' GROUP BY document_id) e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND depenses_totales > 1.2 * recettes_totales

question_fr: Évolution du ratio dette/recettes (D001/RF01) par commune entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH ratios AS (SELECT d.siret, d.document_year, CAST(e1.value AS REAL) / CAST(e2.value AS REAL) AS ratio FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e1 ON d.document_id = e1.document_id JOIN extraction_results e2 ON d.document_id = e2.document_id WHERE e1.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND e2.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND e1.value <> '' AND e2.value <> '' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')) SELECT siret, MAX(CASE document_year WHEN '2023' THEN ratio END) AS ratio_2023, MAX(CASE document_year WHEN '2024' THEN ratio END) AS ratio_2024 FROM ratios GROUP BY siret

question_fr: Corrélation entre le nombre de pages des documents et le taux d'erreur d'extraction par commune en 2024.

question_fr: Répartition des documents par type de masque et année budgétaire.

question_fr: Top 5 des communes par montant total d'investissement (DF011) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_investissement DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Comparaison des recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) entre communes de moins de 10 000 habitants et les autres en 2024 (basé sur SIRET).
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(d.siret, 10, 5) AS INTEGER) < 10000 THEN 'Petites communes' ELSE 'Grandes communes' END AS categorie, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS recettes_moyennes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY categorie;

question_fr: Évolution du montant total des investissements (DF011) entre 2023 et 2024 par région (3 premiers chiffres SIRET).
sql: SELECT SUBSTR(d.siret, 1, 3) AS region, d.document_year, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY region, d.document_year ORDER BY region, d.document_year;

question_fr: Communes où les dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) dépassent les recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM (SELECT d.document_id, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS depenses, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS recettes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('DF01','RF01') GROUP BY d.document_id) AS sub JOIN documents d ON sub.document_id = d.document_id WHERE sub.depenses > sub.recettes GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Taux de documents présentant des erreurs d'extraction pour la dette (D001) en 2024.
sql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'D001' AND document_year = '2024')) AS taux_erreur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> '';

question_fr: Communes dont le ratio dette/recettes (D001/RF01) dépasse 1.5 en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM (SELECT d.document_id, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS dette, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS recettes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','RF01') GROUP BY d.document_id) AS sub JOIN documents d ON sub.document_id = d.document_id WHERE sub.dette / sub.recettes > 1.5 GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Évolution du nombre de documents traités par mois en 2024.
sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', created_at) AS mois, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY mois ORDER BY mois;

question_fr: Corrélation entre le nombre de pages des documents et le nombre d'erreurs d'extraction en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.document_id, d.nb_pages, COUNT(er.result_id) AS nombre_erreurs FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> '' WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.document_id;

question_fr: Communes où la dette (D001) a augmenté de plus de 15% entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS dette FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.siret), dette_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS dette FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.siret) SELECT d.city_name FROM dette_2024 d4 JOIN dette_2023 d3 ON d4.siret = d3.siret JOIN documents d ON d4.siret = d.siret WHERE d4.dette > d3.dette * 1.15 GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Communes avec un excédent budgétaire (RF01 > DF01) en 2023 et un déficit (RF01 < DF01) en 2024.
sql: WITH bilan_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) - MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS solde FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('RF01','DF01') GROUP BY d.document_id), bilan_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) - MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS solde FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('RF01','DF01') GROUP BY d.document_id) SELECT d.city_name FROM documents d WHERE d.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM bilan_2023 WHERE solde > 0) AND d.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM bilan_2024 WHERE solde < 0) GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des investissements (DF011) pour toutes les communes en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissements FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de communes ont déclaré des dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) supérieures à 1 million d'euros en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.siret) FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND CAST(e.value AS REAL) > 1000000 AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un ratio recettes/dettes (RF01/D001) inférieur à 0.7 en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quel est le montant maximal de dette (D001) déclaré par une commune en 2024 ?

question_fr: Liste des communes dont le document dépasse 300 pages en 2024.

question_fr: Top 10 des communes par montant total de recettes d'investissement (RI01) en 2024.

question_fr: Comparaison du taux d'endettement moyen (D001/RF01) entre budgets principaux et annexes en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, AVG(CAST(e1.value AS REAL) / CAST(e2.value AS REAL)) AS ratio_moyen FROM extraction_results e1 JOIN extraction_results e2 ON e1.document_id = e2.document_id JOIN documents d ON e1.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e1.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND e2.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur dette (D001) augmenter de plus de 20% entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'), dette_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name FROM dette_2024 d4 JOIN dette_2023 d3 ON d4.siret = d3.siret JOIN documents d ON d4.siret = d.siret WHERE d4.valeur > d3.valeur * 1.20;

question_fr: Répartition des documents par type de masque et budget type en 2024.
sql: SELECT mask, budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY mask, budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est l'indicateur financier le plus fréquemment extrait avec des erreurs en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT e.safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS nombre_erreurs FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND e.message_error IS NOT NULL AND e.message_error != '' GROUP BY e.safir_field_id ORDER BY nombre_erreurs DESC LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Comparaison des recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) moyennes entre documents PDF et scans en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.format, AVG(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS recettes_moyennes FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND d.format IN ('pdf', 'scan') GROUP BY d.format;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un excédent de fonctionnement (RF01 > DF01) en 2024 mais un déficit en 2023 ?
sql: WITH solde_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, MAX(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) END) - MAX(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) END) AS solde FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND e.safir_field_id IN ('RF01', 'DF01') GROUP BY d.siret HAVING solde < 0), solde_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, MAX(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) END) - MAX(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) END) AS solde FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND e.safir_field_id IN ('RF01', 'DF01') GROUP BY d.siret HAVING solde > 0) SELECT d.city_name FROM solde_2024 s4 JOIN solde_2023 s3 ON s4.siret = s3.siret JOIN documents d ON s4.siret = d.siret;

question_fr: Détecter les communes où les dépenses totales (DF01 + DF011) dépassent de 30% les recettes totales (RF01 + RI01) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM (SELECT document_id, SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id IN ('DF01', 'DF011') THEN CAST(value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS depenses, SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id IN ('RF01', 'RI01') THEN CAST(value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes FROM extraction_results WHERE document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') GROUP BY document_id HAVING depenses > recettes * 1.30) res JOIN documents d ON res.document_id = d.document_id;

question_fr: Taux de documents avec au moins une erreur de validation pour la règle 'D001_coherence' en 2024.
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.document_id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') AS taux_erreur FROM extraction_results e JOIN validation_rules vr ON e.safir_field_id IN (SELECT value FROM json_each(vr.safir_field_id_list)) WHERE vr.validation_rule_id = 'D001_coherence' AND e.message_error IS NOT NULL AND e.message_error != '' AND e.document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024');

question_fr: Classement des régions (3 premiers chiffres SIRET) par augmentation moyenne de la dette (D001) entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT SUBSTR(d.siret,1,3) AS region, AVG(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS moyenne FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY region), dette_2024 AS (SELECT SUBSTR(d.siret,1,3) AS region, AVG(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS moyenne FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY region) SELECT d4.region, (d4.moyenne - d3.moyenne) AS augmentation FROM dette_2024 d4 JOIN dette_2023 d3 ON d4.region = d3.region ORDER BY augmentation DESC;

sql: SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM documents WHERE budget_type = 'BA' AND document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) augmenter de plus de 10% entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH recettes_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2023'), recettes_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT r2024.city_name FROM recettes_2024 r2024 JOIN recettes_2023 r2023 ON r2024.city_name = r2023.city_name WHERE (r2024.valeur - r2023.valeur) / r2023.valeur > 0.1;

question_fr: Répartition du nombre de documents par type de masque en 2024.
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Top 5 des communes par montant d'investissement (DF011) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS investissement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' ORDER BY investissement DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents avec des erreurs d'extraction pour la dette (D001) en 2024 ?
sql: WITH total_docs AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024'), docs_erreur AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS erreurs FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL) SELECT (erreurs * 100.0 / total) AS pourcentage_erreur FROM docs_erreur, total_docs;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un excédent de fonctionnement (RF01 > DF01) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM extraction_results recettes JOIN extraction_results depenses ON recettes.document_id = depenses.document_id JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = recettes.document_id WHERE recettes.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND depenses.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(recettes.value AS REAL) > CAST(depenses.value AS REAL) GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Évolution du montant total de la dette (D001) entre 2023 et 2024 par région (3 premiers chiffres SIRET).
sql: SELECT SUBSTR(d.siret,1,3) AS region, d.document_year, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS dette_totale FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY region, d.document_year ORDER BY region, d.document_year;

question_fr: Quels sont les indicateurs financiers avec le plus d'erreurs d'extraction en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS nombre_erreurs FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL GROUP BY er.safir_field_id ORDER BY nombre_erreurs DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Montant total des recettes d'investissement (RI01) par type de masque en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.mask, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS recettes_investissement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RI01' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Communes où la dette (D001) dépasse 2 millions d'euros en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > 2000000;

question_fr: Variation absolue des dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) par commune entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH df2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur_2023 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2023'), df2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur_2024 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT df2024.city_name, (df2024.valeur_2024 - df2023.valeur_2023) AS variation FROM df2024 JOIN df2023 ON df2024.city_name = df2023.city_name;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents validés sans avertissement en 2024 ?
sql: WITH docs_valides AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS valides FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND s.code = 'VALIDATED' AND d.warning_message = ''), total_docs AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') SELECT (valides * 100.0 / total) AS taux_valides FROM docs_valides, total_docs;

question_fr: Comparaison du nombre moyen de pages entre documents M57_CA et M57_CFU en 2024.
sql: SELECT mask, AVG(nb_pages) AS pages_moyennes FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' AND mask IN ('M57_CA','M57_CFU') GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Communes avec un ratio investissements/recettes (DF011/RI01) supérieur à 1.5 en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM extraction_results invest JOIN extraction_results recettes ON invest.document_id = recettes.document_id JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = invest.document_id WHERE invest.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND recettes.safir_field_id = 'RI01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(invest.value AS REAL) / CAST(recettes.value AS REAL) > 1.5 GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Répartition des budgets par type (BP/BA) et par année.
sql: SELECT document_year, budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nombre FROM documents GROUP BY document_year, budget_type;

question_fr: Combien de communes ont un ratio dépenses/recettes de fonctionnement (DF01/RF01) supérieur à 1.1 en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.siret) FROM extraction_results er1 JOIN extraction_results er2 ON er1.document_id = er2.document_id JOIN documents d ON er1.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er1.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND (CAST(er1.value AS REAL) / CAST(er2.value AS REAL)) > 1.1;

question_fr: Liste des communes dont les dépenses d'investissement (DF011) dépassent 500 000 euros en 2024.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.city_name FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > 500000;

question_fr: Top 5 des communes par montant total de recettes d'investissement (RI01) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_recettes_investissement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RI01' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_recettes_investissement DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Pourcentage de documents sans erreur d'extraction pour l'indicateur D001 en 2024.
sql: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE er.message_error IS NULL OR er.message_error = '') * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS taux_succes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Comparaison des dépenses de fonctionnement moyennes (DF01) entre documents PDF et scans en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.format, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS depenses_moyennes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.format;

question_fr: Communes où les recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) ont diminué de plus de 5% entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: SELECT d2024.city_name FROM extraction_results er2024 JOIN documents d2024 ON er2024.document_id = d2024.document_id JOIN extraction_results er2023 ON er2023.safir_field_id = 'RF01' JOIN documents d2023 ON er2023.document_id = d2023.document_id WHERE er2024.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d2024.document_year = '2024' AND d2023.document_year = '2023' AND d2024.siret = d2023.siret AND (CAST(er2024.value AS REAL) < CAST(er2023.value AS REAL) * 0.95);

question_fr: Montant total des investissements (DF011) par type de masque technique en 2024.

question_fr: Nombre de communes ayant un excédent de fonctionnement (RF01 > DF01) en 2024.
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.siret) FROM extraction_results er_rev JOIN extraction_results er_dep ON er_rev.document_id = er_dep.document_id JOIN documents d ON er_rev.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er_rev.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND er_dep.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(er_rev.value AS REAL) > CAST(er_dep.value AS REAL);

question_fr: Top 3 des indicateurs financiers avec le plus d'erreurs d'extraction en 2024.

question_fr: Différence absolue moyenne entre les dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) et les recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) par commune en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, AVG(ABS(CAST(er_dep.value AS REAL) - CAST(er_rev.value AS REAL))) AS difference_moyenne FROM extraction_results er_dep JOIN extraction_results er_rev ON er_dep.document_id = er_rev.document_id JOIN documents d ON er_dep.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er_dep.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND er_rev.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Communes où la part des investissements dans les dépenses totales (DF011/(DF01+DF011)) dépasse 40% en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM extraction_results er_inv JOIN extraction_results er_dep ON er_inv.document_id = er_dep.document_id JOIN documents d ON er_inv.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er_inv.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er_dep.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND (CAST(er_inv.value AS REAL) / (CAST(er_inv.value AS REAL) + CAST(er_dep.value AS REAL))) > 0.4;

question_fr: Nombre de documents traités par mois en 2024.
sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', created_at) AS mois, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY mois;

question_fr: Ratio moyen des recettes d'investissement sur les dépenses d'investissement (RI01/DF011) par type de budget en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, AVG(CAST(er_rev.value AS REAL) / CAST(er_dep.value AS REAL)) AS ratio_moyen FROM extraction_results er_rev JOIN extraction_results er_dep ON er_rev.document_id = er_dep.document_id JOIN documents d ON er_rev.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er_rev.safir_field_id = 'RI01' AND er_dep.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des dépenses de fonctionnement pour la commune de Strasbourg en 2024 ?

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT siret) AS nombre_communes FROM documents WHERE mask = 'M57_CA' AND document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur moyenne des investissements déclarés en 2024 ?

question_fr: Top 5 des communes par montant de recettes d'investissement en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS recettes_investissement FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'RI01' AND d.document_year = '2024' ORDER BY recettes_investissement DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Comparaison du nombre de documents traités avec succès entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(*) AS documents_reussis FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des budgets annexes présente un excédent de fonctionnement en 2024 ?
sql: WITH budgets AS (SELECT d.document_id, MAX(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) END) AS recettes, MAX(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) END) AS depenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.document_id) SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN recettes > depenses THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS pourcentage_excedent FROM budgets;

question_fr: Quelle est la commune avec la plus forte augmentation de dette entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'), dette_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name, (d2024.dette - d2023.dette) AS augmentation FROM documents d JOIN dette_2023 d2023 ON d.siret = d2023.siret JOIN dette_2024 d2024 ON d.siret = d2024.siret ORDER BY augmentation DESC LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Répartition des types de masque technique pour les documents de plus de 200 pages.
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE nb_pages > 200 GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quels indicateurs financiers ont le plus d'erreurs d'extraction en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS nombre_erreurs FROM extraction_results WHERE message_error IS NOT NULL AND message_error != '' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY nombre_erreurs DESC LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Montant total des investissements par région (3 premiers chiffres SIRET) en 2024.
sql: SELECT SUBSTR(d.siret,1,3) AS region, SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissements FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY region;

question_fr: Communes où les dépenses de fonctionnement dépassent 1 million d'euros en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND CAST(e.value AS REAL) > 1000000 AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Évolution du taux d'endettement moyen entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: SELECT d.document_year, AVG(CAST(dette.value AS REAL) / CAST(recettes.value AS REAL)) AS taux_moyen FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results dette ON d.document_id = dette.document_id JOIN extraction_results recettes ON d.document_id = recettes.document_id WHERE dette.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND recettes.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle commune a le plus haut ratio investissements/recettes en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, MAX(CAST(inv.value AS REAL) / CAST(rec.value AS REAL)) AS ratio FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results inv ON d.document_id = inv.document_id JOIN extraction_results rec ON d.document_id = rec.document_id WHERE inv.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND rec.safir_field_id = 'RI01' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY ratio DESC LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Nombre de documents avec des erreurs de validation pour la règle 'D001_coherence' en 2024.
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.result_id) AS nombre_erreurs FROM extraction_results er JOIN validation_rules vr ON er.message_error LIKE '%'||vr.validation_rule_id||'%' JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE vr.definition LIKE '%D001_coherence%' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quel est le montant médian des recettes de fonctionnement par commune en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' ORDER BY recettes LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') / 2;

question_fr: Répartition des budgets principaux (BP) et annexes (BA) en 2023.
sql: SELECT budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nombre FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023' GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Communes dont la dette a diminué d'au moins 10% entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'), dette_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name FROM documents d JOIN dette_2023 d23 ON d.siret = d23.siret JOIN dette_2024 d24 ON d.siret = d24.siret WHERE (d23.dette - d24.dette) / d23.dette >= 0.1;

question_fr: Top 3 des indicateurs avec le plus de valeurs manquantes en 2024.
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS valeurs_manquantes FROM extraction_results WHERE (value IS NULL OR value = '') AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY valeurs_manquantes DESC LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents sans avertissement pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants ?
sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN d.warning_message = '' OR d.warning_message IS NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS taux_sans_avertissement FROM documents d WHERE SUBSTR(d.siret,1,3) IN ('212','213','214') AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de communes ont publié un budget principal (BP) en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT siret) AS nombre_communes FROM documents WHERE budget_type = 'BP' AND document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen dépenses d'investissement / recettes d'investissement (DF011/RI01) par commune en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.siret, AVG(i.invest_depenses / i.invest_recettes) AS ratio_moyen FROM (SELECT er1.document_id, CAST(er1.value AS REAL) AS invest_depenses, CAST(er2.value AS REAL) AS invest_recettes FROM extraction_results er1 JOIN extraction_results er2 ON er1.document_id = er2.document_id WHERE er1.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'RI01') i JOIN documents d ON i.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.siret;

question_fr: Liste des 10 communes avec la plus forte augmentation de recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH data_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS rf01_2023 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2023'), data_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS rf01_2024 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name, (d24.rf01_2024 - d23.rf01_2023) AS augmentation FROM data_2023 d23 JOIN data_2024 d24 ON d23.siret = d24.siret JOIN documents d ON d23.siret = d.siret ORDER BY augmentation DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Pourcentage de documents avec des investissements (DF011) supérieurs à 500 000 euros en 2024.

question_fr: Comparaison des dépenses de fonctionnement moyennes (DF01) entre documents M57_CA et M57_CFU en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.mask, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS depenses_moyennes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND d.mask IN ('M57_CA','M57_CFU') GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Communes où les dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) dépassent 1 million d'euros en 2024.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.city_name FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > 1000000;

question_fr: Ratio dette/recettes totales (D001/(RF01+RI01)) par commune en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (CAST(er_d.value AS REAL) / (CAST(er_rf.value AS REAL) + CAST(er_ri.value AS REAL))) AS ratio FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_d ON d.document_id = er_d.document_id AND er_d.safir_field_id = 'D001' JOIN extraction_results er_rf ON d.document_id = er_rf.document_id AND er_rf.safir_field_id = 'RF01' JOIN extraction_results er_ri ON d.document_id = er_ri.document_id AND er_ri.safir_field_id = 'RI01' WHERE d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Nombre de communes avec une augmentation de plus de 10% des recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH data_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS rf01_2023 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2023'), data_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS rf01_2024 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT COUNT(*) AS nombre_communes FROM data_2023 d23 JOIN data_2024 d24 ON d23.siret = d24.siret WHERE (d24.rf01_2024 - d23.rf01_2023) / d23.rf01_2023 > 0.1;

question_fr: Valeur totale des investissements (DF011) par mois de création des documents en 2024.
sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', d.created_at) AS mois, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissements FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY mois;

question_fr: Communes dont la dette (D001) représente plus de 50% des recettes totales en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_d ON d.document_id = er_d.document_id AND er_d.safir_field_id = 'D001' JOIN extraction_results er_rf ON d.document_id = er_rf.document_id AND er_rf.safir_field_id = 'RF01' JOIN extraction_results er_ri ON d.document_id = er_ri.document_id AND er_ri.safir_field_id = 'RI01' WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND (CAST(er_d.value AS REAL) / (CAST(er_rf.value AS REAL) + CAST(er_ri.value AS REAL))) > 0.5;

question_fr: Différence absolue entre dépenses et recettes de fonctionnement (DF01 - RF01) par commune en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (CAST(er_df.value AS REAL) - CAST(er_rf.value AS REAL)) AS solde_fonctionnement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_df ON d.document_id = er_df.document_id AND er_df.safir_field_id = 'DF01' JOIN extraction_results er_rf ON d.document_id = er_rf.document_id AND er_rf.safir_field_id = 'RF01' WHERE d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Top 3 des indicateurs financiers avec le plus de valeurs nulles ou vides en 2024.
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS nombre_vides FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND (er.value IS NULL OR er.value = '') GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY nombre_vides DESC LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Communes avec une diminution de plus de 15% des dépenses d'investissement (DF011) entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH data_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df011_2023 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2023'), data_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df011_2024 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name FROM data_2023 d23 JOIN data_2024 d24 ON d23.siret = d24.siret JOIN documents d ON d23.siret = d.siret WHERE (d24.df011_2024 - d23.df011_2023) / d23.df011_2023 < -0.15;

question_fr: Répartition des budgets par type (BP/BA) et par nombre de pages (<100, 100-300, >300) en 2024.
sql: SELECT budget_type, CASE WHEN nb_pages < 100 THEN '<100' WHEN nb_pages BETWEEN 100 AND 300 THEN '100-300' ELSE '>300' END AS tranche_pages, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY budget_type, tranche_pages;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des recettes de fonctionnement (RF01) pour la commune de Strasbourg en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_recettes FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.city_name = 'EUROMETROPOLE STRASBOURG' AND d.document_year = '2024'

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur moyenne des investissements (DF011) déclarés dans les budgets principaux (BP) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS investissement_moyen FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2024'

question_fr: Liste des communes ayant publié des documents avec plus de 300 pages en 2024.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM documents WHERE nb_pages > 300 AND document_year = '2024'

question_fr: Top 5 des communes par montant total de dette (D001) en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS dette_totale FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.siret, d.city_name ORDER BY dette_totale DESC LIMIT 5

question_fr: Comparaison du nombre de documents traités entre formats PDF et scan par année.
sql: SELECT document_year, format, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE format IN ('pdf', 'scan') GROUP BY document_year, format

question_fr: Pourcentage des budgets annexes (BA) présentant un excédent de fonctionnement (RF01 > DF01) en 2024.
sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN CAST(rf.value AS REAL) > CAST(df.value AS REAL) THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS pourcentage_excedent FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results rf ON d.document_id = rf.document_id AND rf.safir_field_id = 'RF01' JOIN extraction_results df ON d.document_id = df.document_id AND df.safir_field_id = 'DF01' WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2024'

question_fr: Évolution du montant moyen des dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) entre 2023 et 2024 par type de masque technique.
sql: SELECT mask, document_year, AVG(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS depenses_moyennes FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY mask, document_year

question_fr: Communes dont la part des investissements dans les dépenses totales (DF011/(DF01+DF011)) dépasse 30% en 2024.
sql: WITH depenses AS (SELECT d.document_id, d.siret, d.city_name, CAST(df01.value AS REAL) AS fonct, CAST(df011.value AS REAL) AS invest FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results df01 ON d.document_id = df01.document_id AND df01.safir_field_id = 'DF01' JOIN extraction_results df011 ON d.document_id = df011.document_id AND df011.safir_field_id = 'DF011' WHERE d.document_year = '2024') SELECT city_name, (invest / (fonct + invest)) * 100 AS part_investissement FROM depenses WHERE (invest / (fonct + invest)) > 0.3

question_fr: Indicateurs financiers avec le plus grand écart relatif entre valeur extraite et moyenne sectorielle en 2024 (top 10).
sql: WITH sectoriel AS (SELECT safir_field_id, AVG(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS moyenne FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY safir_field_id), ecarts AS (SELECT e.safir_field_id, e.document_id, ABS(CAST(e.value AS REAL) - s.moyenne) / s.moyenne AS ecart_rel FROM extraction_results e JOIN sectoriel s ON e.safir_field_id = s.safir_field_id JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024') SELECT safir_field_id, AVG(ecart_rel) AS ecart_moyen FROM ecarts GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY ecart_moyen DESC LIMIT 10

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des investissements (DF011) déclarés dans les budgets principaux (BP) pour l'année 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investissements
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
AND d.document_year = '2024';
